name: codex-global-skills
description: Portable skill bundle for multiple AI agents.

skills.name: brandkit
skills.description: Premium brand-kit generation for logo systems, identity boards, and visual guidelines.

skills.name: brutalist-skill
skills.description: Industrial brutalist UI direction with Swiss-grid, terminal, and tactical interface aesthetics.

skills.name: bug-trace-root-cause
skills.description: Structured debugging workflow for tracing a bug from symptom to proven root cause.

skills.name: merge-conflict-analysis
skills.description: Analyze code merge conflicts and recommend the safest resolution path.

skills.name: frontend-performance-review
skills.description: Frontend performance and stability review for leaks, jank, excessive re-renders, and missing cleanup.

skills.name: gpt-tasteskill
skills.description: High-end editorial frontend direction with bold layout variance and advanced motion ideas.

skills.name: gsap-core
skills.description: GSAP core API guidance for basic animation, easing, transforms, and stagger.

skills.name: gsap-frameworks
skills.description: GSAP usage in Vue, Svelte, Nuxt, and other non-React frameworks.

skills.name: gsap-performance
skills.description: GSAP performance guidance for smooth animation and lower layout thrash.

skills.name: gsap-plugins
skills.description: GSAP plugin guidance for ScrollTo, Flip, Draggable, SplitText, and related plugins.

skills.name: gsap-react
skills.description: GSAP patterns for React and Next.js with refs, useGSAP, and cleanup.

skills.name: gsap-scrolltrigger
skills.description: Scroll-driven GSAP animation with pinning, scrubbing, and trigger setup.

skills.name: gsap-timeline
skills.description: GSAP timeline sequencing for multi-step animation choreography.

skills.name: gsap-utils
skills.description: GSAP utility helpers like clamp, mapRange, wrap, random, and interpolation.

skills.name: imagegen-frontend-mobile
skills.description: Premium mobile app concept generation through image-first UI exploration.

skills.name: imagegen-frontend-web
skills.description: Premium website section-by-section image reference generation.

skills.name: image-to-code-skill
skills.description: Image-first workflow that creates or uses design references before implementing frontend code.

skills.name: minimalist-skill
skills.description: Editorial minimalist interface direction with restrained color and clean hierarchy.

skills.name: output-skill
skills.description: Enforces complete outputs without placeholders or silent truncation.

skills.name: project-quick-onboard
skills.description: Fast technical onboarding for an unfamiliar repo, stack, structure, and likely entry points.

skills.name: redesign-skill
skills.description: Upgrades an existing website or app without rewriting it from scratch.

skills.name: soft-skill
skills.description: High-end design polish rules for typography, spacing, surfaces, and overall premium feel.

skills.name: solution-direction
skills.description: Suggests solution directions and tradeoffs without jumping straight into implementation.

skills.name: stitch-skill
skills.description: Generates DESIGN.md guidance for Google Stitch and similar AI-driven design workflows.

skills.name: taste-skill
skills.description: Anti-slop frontend direction for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns.

skills.name: taste-skill-v1
skills.description: Legacy v1 version of the taste skill for older workflows.
